title: Line 1: Modern Mainline - Precise Retreat
pgn: 1. e4 d5 2. exd5 Qxd5 3. Nc3 Qa5 4. d4 Nf6 5. Nf3 c6 6. Bc4 Bf5 7. Bd2 e6 8. Nd5 Qd8
description: The gold standard for stability and solid structure. Range: 1000-2400.

goals.title: Immediate Challenge
goals.description: We strike the _center_ immediately to open lines for our pieces.

goals.title: Active Queen
goals.description: We recapture the pawn and bring the Queen into the action.

goals.title: The Safe Haven
goals.description: Our Queen finds a safe _outpost_ on the edge of the board.

goals.title: Development
goals.description: Standard development while eyeing the central squares with our Knight.

goals.title: Solid Foundation
goals.description: Providing a _retreat_ for the Queen and blunting White's attack.

goals.title: Active Bishop
goals.description: Developing the Bishop before we lock the central pawn chain.

goals.title: Reinforcement
goals.description: Connecting our pawns and preparing the _kingside_ for development.

goals.title: Safe Home
goals.description: The Queen returns home after dodging the tactical _threat_.

title: Line 2: Portuguese Gambit - Dynamic Chaos
pgn: 1. e4 d5 2. exd5 Nf6 3. d4 Bg4 4. f3 Bf5 5. c4 e6 6. dxe6 Nc6 7. Be3 Qe7 8. Nc3 O-O-O
description: A sharp _gambit_ focusing on rapid piece activity. Range: 1200-2000.

goals.title: Hidden Intent
goals.description: Delaying the recapture to create a more _dynamic_ position.

goals.title: Aggressive Pin
goals.description: We provoke a weakness in White's kingside _structure_ immediately.

goals.title: Tactical Retreat
goals.description: Drawing the pawn forward creates a permanent _target_ for us.

goals.title: Center Break
goals.description: Sacrificing a pawn to open lines for a heavy _attack_.

goals.title: Rapid Pressure
goals.description: Our Knight exerts huge _leverage_ against the d4 square.

goals.title: Central Battery
goals.description: Preparing to castle and placing the Queen on an _open_ file.

goals.title: Full Power
goals.description: We castle long to bring the _Rook_ into the fight.

title: Line 3: Icelandic Gambit - The Squeeze
pgn: 1. e4 d5 2. exd5 Nf6 3. c4 e6 4. dxe6 Bxe6 5. Nf3 Qe7 6. Qe2 Nc6 7. d4 O-O-O 8. d5 Qb4+
description: A tricky _gambit_ that punishes greedy White players. Range: 900-1800.

goals.title: The Hook
goals.description: We offer a second pawn to gain a massive _lead_ in development.

goals.title: Clean Lines
goals.description: Our Bishop is perfectly placed to target the _flank_.

goals.title: Direct X-Ray
goals.description: Lining up against the King to create a nasty _discovery_.

goals.title: Developing Speed
goals.description: Preparing to castle while keeping our pieces _active_ and ready.

goals.title: Safety First
goals.description: Getting the King safe while lining up a powerful _battery_.

goals.title: Aggressive Check
goals.description: Forcing the White King to make a difficult _decision_.

title: Line 4: Blackburne Gambit - Trap Setting
pgn: 1. e4 d5 2. exd5 c6 3. dxc6 Nxc6 4. Nf3 e5 5. Bb5 Bd6 6. O-O Nge7 7. d4 exd4 8. Nxd4 O-O
description: An old-school _gambit_ focused on central control. Range: 800-1600.

goals.title: The Bait
goals.description: Sacrificing material for rapid development and a strong _center_.

goals.title: Piece Activity
goals.description: Our Knight enters the fray, controlling vital _squares_.

goals.title: Central Presence
goals.description: Claiming the middle of the board and restricting the _opponents_ pieces.

goals.title: Supportive Bishop
goals.description: Defending our center while preparing for a quick _castle_.

goals.title: Second Knight
goals.description: Developing the Knight to a square where it provides _flexibility_.

goals.title: Opening Lines
goals.description: Clearing the center to allow our pieces more _scope_.

goals.title: King Safety
goals.description: Completing our development and securing the most important _piece_.
